beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: You must be Sera's mystery patient! She said you might need a room.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: Good news, I have a spare room. Two thousand gold a night!

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: What? Clean sheets, a roof that behaves itself most days, and dinner close enough to smell. Fair price.

beats.speaker: MC
beats.text: I do not have that kind of money...

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: Yeah, I figured. Sorry. Bad habit, saying the scary number first.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: But! I am extremely reasonable when someone catches me at the right time.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: I have a small problem. I lost my axe in the forest while gathering ingredients. Wolves showed up, and I made the very wise choice to leave first.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: I [i]hate[/i] wolves. But you look like the adventuring type! Think you could retrieve it for me?

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: I could rent out the room for you for free for a little bit if you do that for me. Temporarily, that is, as long as you keep earning your keep!

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: That's the spirit! I like you already. The forest is close, but keep your head up.

options.text: That expensive room just to retrieve an axe?

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: It is a very good axe. Also, you are getting the friends-and-mortal-danger discount, so really, we both win.

options.text: Sera said I should be resting...

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: She is right. Usually is, annoyingly. I can come with you, though, and we will keep it quick.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: Go south of the village to leave when you are ready. I can come with you too if you'd like, just holler at me.
